cards.back:
I → am
He/She/It → is
We/You/They → are

记忆口诀：我用am，你用are，is跟着他她它
cards.example: I am a student. She is tall. They are happy.

cards.back:
am/is/are 后面加 not
缩写：isn't = is not，aren't = are not
cards.example: I am not late. He is not tall. → He isn't tall.

cards.back:
把am/is/are移到句首
回答：Yes, ... am/is/are. / No, ... am not/isn't/aren't.
cards.example: Is she a teacher? Yes, she is. / No, she isn't.

cards.back:
一般加s：book → books
以s/x/ch/sh结尾加es：bus→buses, box→boxes
辅音+y→ies：baby→babies
不规则：man→men, child→children, tooth→teeth
cards.hint: 大多数加s，特殊情况记牢
cards.example: two books, three buses, many babies, five men

cards.back:
a：用在辅音音素开头的单词前
an：用在元音音素(a/e/i/o/u)开头的单词前
the：特指，已知的事物
cards.example: a book, an apple, an hour, the sun

cards.back:
this（这个）→ these（这些）：近处
that（那个）→ those（那些）：远处
cards.example: This is my pen. Those are your books.

cards.back:
I / you / he / she / it
we / you / they
作主语用主格
cards.example: He is my brother. They are students.

cards.back:
me / you / him / her / it
us / you / them
作宾语用宾格
cards.example: Please help me. I like him.

cards.back:
my / your / his / her / its
our / your / their
修饰名词，放在名词前
cards.example: my book, her bag, their school

cards.back:
there is + 单数名词（有一个…）
there are + 复数名词（有多个…）
否定：there is no / there are no
cards.example: There is a cat. There are three books.

cards.back:
表示习惯性动作或客观事实
第三人称单数：动词+s/es
I/you/we/they：动词原形
cards.example: I play football. She plays the piano.

cards.back:
I/you/we/they：don't + 动词原形
He/she/it：doesn't + 动词原形
cards.example: I don't like fish. She doesn't watch TV.

cards.back:
Do + I/you/we/they + 动词原形？
Does + he/she/it + 动词原形？
cards.example: Do you like sports? Does he play chess?

cards.back:
am/is/are + 动词-ing
动词+ing规则：一般加ing，末尾e去e加ing，辅元辅双写加ing
cards.example: I am reading. She is swimming. They are playing.

cards.back:
can + 动词原形（能，会）
否定：cannot / can't
疑问：Can + 主语 + 动词原形?
cards.example: I can swim. Can you speak Chinese? No, I can't.

cards.back:
in（在…里）on（在…上）under（在…下）
next to（紧邻）behind（在…后）in front of（在…前）
between（在…之间）near（在…附近）
cards.example: The book is on the desk. The cat is under the chair.

cards.back:
at：具体时刻（at 7 o'clock, at night）
in：年/月/季节/上下午（in 2024, in May, in summer）
on：具体某天（on Monday, on July 1st）
cards.example: at 8:00, in January, on my birthday

cards.back:
always(100%)>usually(80%)>often(60%)>sometimes(40%)>never(0%)
放在be动词后，实义动词前
cards.example: She is always happy. I never eat meat.

cards.back:
肯定：动词原形开头（表命令/请求）
否定：Don't + 动词原形
礼貌：Please + 动词原形
cards.example: Open the door. Don't run. Please sit down.

cards.back:
What + a/an + 形容词 + 名词 + 主语 + 谓语!
How + 形容词/副词 + 主语 + 谓语!
cards.example: What a nice day! How beautiful she is!

cards.back:
规则动词：动词+ed
不规则：go→went, come→came, have→had, do→did, see→saw
否定：didn't + 动词原形
cards.example: I played football yesterday. She went to school.

cards.front: 常见不规则动词过去式
cards.back:
be→was/were, go→went, come→came
have→had, do→did, see→saw
take→took, make→made, say→said
get→got, give→gave, write→wrote
buy→bought, think→thought
cards.hint: 不规则动词需要逐个背
cards.example: She went shopping. I bought a book.

cards.back:
will + 动词原形（预测/决定/意愿）
否定：won't = will not
疑问：Will + 主语 + 动词原形?
cards.example: I will visit Beijing. Will you come? No, I won't.

cards.back:
be going to + 动词原形（计划/打算）
与will的区别：be going to强调有计划
cards.example: I am going to study English tonight.

cards.back:
一般：+er（tall→taller）
以e结尾：+r（nice→nicer）
辅元辅：双写+er（big→bigger）
多音节：more+形容词（more beautiful）
不规则：good→better, bad→worse
cards.example: Tom is taller than Jack. This is more interesting.

cards.back:
一般：+est（tall→tallest）
多音节：most+形容词（most beautiful）
不规则：good→best, bad→worst
用法：the+最高级+of/in
cards.example: She is the tallest in our class. He runs the fastest.

cards.back:
should + 动词原形（应该）
否定：shouldn't（不应该）
表建议或义务
cards.example: You should eat more vegetables. You shouldn't stay up late.

cards.back:
must：主观认为必须（内心要求）
have to：客观原因不得不
否定区别：mustn't（禁止）vs don't have to（不必须）
cards.example: You must be quiet. I have to go now.

cards.back:
to + 动词原形
作目的：I go to school to learn.
作宾语：I want to go.
常接不定式：want/like/hope/decide/plan/try
cards.example: I want to eat pizza. She decided to study harder.

cards.back:
and：并列（而且）
but：转折（但是）
or：选择（或者）
so：结果（所以）
because：原因（因为）
cards.example: I like cats but I am afraid of dogs.

cards.back:
have/has + 过去分词
表示：过去的动作对现在有影响
常用词：already（已经）, yet（还没）, ever, never, just
cards.example: I have already done my homework. Has she come yet?

cards.back:
规则：同过去式（+ed）
不规则：go→gone, come→come, be→been
take→taken, make→made, write→written
give→given, do→done, see→seen
cards.hint: 规则同过去式，不规则要背
cards.example: I have visited the museum. She has seen the film.

cards.back:
be动词 + 过去分词
一般现在时被动：am/is/are + done
一般过去时被动：was/were + done
cards.example: English is spoken worldwide. The window was broken.

cards.back:
主句 + 连接词 + 从句
连接词：that, if/whether, what/when/where/who
从句用陈述句语序
cards.example: I think that he is right. Do you know where she lives?

cards.back:
that/which：修饰物
who：修饰人
whose：表所属关系
cards.example: The book that I bought is good. The girl who sings is my sister.

cards.back:
if引导条件句
真实条件：if+一般现在时，主句+will
主句和从句的时态搭配要注意
cards.hint: if从句用现在时，主句用将来时
cards.example: If it rains, I will stay at home. If you study hard, you will succeed.

cards.back:
直接引语→间接引语的变化：
代词变化：I→he/she
时态后移：is→was, will→would
时间地点词：now→then, here→there
cards.example: She said, 'I am tired.' → She said that she was tired.

cards.back:
too + 形容词/副词 + to do（太…以至于不能）
形容词/副词 + enough + to do（足够…能够）
cards.example: He is too young to drive. She is old enough to go to school.

cards.back:
动词+ing作名词用
作主语：Swimming is fun.
作宾语（喜好类动词后）：enjoy/like/finish/mind/keep + doing
cards.example: Swimming is good exercise. I enjoy reading books.

cards.back:
疑问词 + 一般疑问句语序
What（什么）Who（谁）Where（哪里）When（何时）
Why（为什么）How（怎样）Which（哪个）How many/much
cards.hint: 疑问词开头+一般疑问句
cards.example: What do you do? Where does she live? How old are you?
